# GitHub Copilot Instructions

The canonical agent instructions for this repository live in **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)**. Read that file.

Before non-trivial work, also read:

- [`docs/CONTEXT.md`](../docs/CONTEXT.md) — domain glossary (Show, Syntax, Host, Guest, Content, etc.).
- [`docs/adr/`](../docs/adr/) — architecture decisions (Drizzle/Postgres, text IDs, unified content model, naming conventions).

If anything in this file appears to contradict `AGENTS.md`, trust `AGENTS.md`.
